deals.Description: AI-led lending platform using AI models for underwriting and operational efficiency, with a presence in MENA and North America.
Health tech company with wearable technology powered by AI-driven insights, continuously tracking biometric data for personalized guidance on sleep, recovery, and overall performance.

deals.Description: A US-led investment fund to support growth and innovation in artificial intelligence, energy projects, critical minerals, and semiconductors.
deals.Investors: US (contributing $250 million), UAE's Mubadala, Qatar's wealth fund, Japan's SoftBank, Singapore's Temasek.

deals.Startup_Name: Women Exporters in the Digital Economy Fund
deals.Description: A fund providing technical assistance and grants to women entrepreneurs in the digital economy, with a program launch scheduled for Amman.
deals.Amount: $1.7 million (initial disbursement of a $3.76 million first-phase package)
